name: Password Spray / Credential Stuffing Actors
description: Password Spray and Credential Stuffing Actors gain access by using large volumes of stolen credentials or commonly used passwords against enterprise identity platforms, VPNs, SaaS applications, and customer portals. Rather than exploiting software vulnerabilities, these actors rely on password re...
strategic_objectives: Obtain valid account access at scale using stolen or guessed
Exploit password reuse and weak authentication hygiene
Enable downstream ransomware, BEC, fraud, and access resale
